title: eleusine coracana var. stricta
intro: Eleusine coracana var. stricta, also known as finger millet or kodo millet, is a variety of millet plant belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, with its leaves and seeds containing compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antidiabetic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eleusine coracana var. stricta include its ability to help manage blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, where the leaves and seeds are typically dried and then consumed as a medicinal drink.
